summary: Excellent audience capture of a hot first set and a powerful second set highlighted by an epic Eyes of the World jam.
review: The tape, recorded with Sennheiser ME‑80 mics, delivers a well‑balanced, clear sound that only needs a touch of high‑end EQ. Musically the show is fire from the opening song, with Jerry’s guitar soaring while his voice sounds a bit froggy, and a standout Eyes of the World jam that puts Phil Lesh in full “zone”. Overall it’s a strong, A‑game performance that doesn’t even miss an encore.

ai_rating.rationale: The single detailed 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the tape quality, indicating a top‑tier show with excellent recording despite minor EQ needs.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced and clear capture using Sennheiser ME‑80 mics; overall great source, only a slight high‑end EQ tweak suggested.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set launches hot and stays solid; second set ramps up to an A‑game performance with a powerful jam, making an encore unnecessary.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Amazing guitar work that shines especially when his voice is scratchy.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass shines during the Eyes of the World jam, putting listeners in the "Phil zone".
